mise_integration.details: Create .config/mise/conf.d/tui.toml with [tasks."tui:up"]. dir="tui", depends=["api:status-wait", "db:status-wait"], run="cargo run".

color_palette.details: Create tui/src/theme.rs. Define Catppuccin (Macchiato/Mocha) colors as ratatui::style::Color::Rgb(r,g,b) constants. Export them. e.g., FLAMINGO, MAUVE, PINK, TEAL, BASE, SURFACE, TEXT, SUBTEXT.
